overview.description: The AllianzIM International Equity Buffer5 ETF (QBIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to track the share price returns of the iShares MSCI EAFE ETF (EFA), up to a cap, while providing a buffer against the first 5% of losses, over athree monthoutcome period, less expenses. EFAis amarket-cap-weighted index of developed-market securities based in Europe,Australiaandthe Far East, excluding the US and Canada. QBIV was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by Allianz.
